raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Irwin has been appointed as Chair of the Committee on Revenue and Taxation.",
    "The Committee on Revenue and Taxation has jurisdiction over income, property, sales, and other taxes in California.",
    "Assemblymember Irwin has previously worked to restore R&D tax credits for California businesses.",
    "Assemblymember Irwin authored legislation to establish CalABLE tax-advantaged savings accounts for individuals with disabilities.",
    "CalABLE accounts allow individuals with disabilities to save for long-term care without losing eligibility for state and local services.",
    "Assemblymember Irwin led efforts to provide tax relief to property owners who have lost their home or business in a natural disaster."
  ]
}
```
